race.description: Spritely Seniors Sprint Country Boosted Hcp (C3)
race.comment: GAYLORD (2) deep into the campaign and is building towards a win. Comes out of a strong rating contest after finishing second over 1000m at Grafton. No excuses today. CRITICAL TIME (9) nice weight drop with the claim today and is due for a change of luck. Closed strongly when a game second over 1015m at Ballina. In the right race today and deserves serious consideration. DANCE GAVIN DANCE (5) is chasing his third-straight win and must be kept safe in this tougher contest. Dominant winner in the heavy (10) going two-back over this at Ballina. Capable of testing this field. BOAMBEE BEACH (4) back in class and will find this more to her liking. Taken to the front with a gritty on-pace second over 1300m at this track. Will go back from the draw and charge late. Each-way.
